title: Navigation menu component with dropdown and route highlighting
purpose: Provides a hamburger menu that toggles a dropdown list of top-level routes, highlighting the active route and handling outside clicks to close the menu.
module_context: Defines a constant array of route objects with their properties including path, label, icon, and exact match flag. Exports a functional component that manages menu state and renders the toggle button and dropdown.

steps.content: Initialize the menu open state to false.
Create a reference to the menu container element.
Track the current location using the routing library.
Set up an event listener for outside clicks to close the menu.
Define a function to determine if a route is active based on the current location.
Render the menu toggle button with an image icon.
IF the menu is open, render the dropdown with route links.
Check if the click occurred outside the menu container.
IF the click was outside, close the menu.
Compare the current path with the route path for exact matches when specified.
ELSE check if the current path starts with the route path for non-exact matches.
